RULING: ARGUED and the Court CONTINUED TO JULY 10, 2003.(DEFENDANT HAS A HEARING DIFFICULTY, IN OPEN COURT HE REQUESTED FOR A "REAL TIME RECORD"-SEATED NEAR THE COURT REPORTER, HE WAS READING IN "REAL TIME" DURING THE PROCEEDINGS.
